purpose: Support TARS inbox browsing and conversational curation by delegating paginated list and review-state updates to memory-api.
dependencies: Memory API Header Auth credential in n8n
Registry Webhook Header Auth credential in n8n
failureModes: missing or invalid registry secret header
notes: REG-04 is the curation surface for TARS. Long inboxes should be paginated and summarized by TARS instead of dumped verbatim.
The workflow intentionally separates durable list/review writes from memory promotion; `promote_to_memory` is a later phase.
